title: Lakota people
content: The Lakota (pronounced;) are a Native American tribe. Also known as the Teton Sioux (from "Thítȟuŋwaŋ"), they are one of the three prominent subcultures of the Sioux people. Their current lands are in North and South Dakota. They speak "Lakȟótiyapi"—the Lakota language, the westernmost of three closely related languages that belong to the Siouan language family.
